mapper.sql: id, data_source, create_time, modify_time, conf, conditions
mapper.insert:
insert into reader_hive
id,
data_source,
create_time,
modify_time,
conf,
conditions,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{dataSource,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.netease.bdms.ndi.service.web.config.mybatis.MyBatisJSONHandler},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{conf,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{conditions,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update reader_hive
data_source = #{dataSource,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.netease.bdms.ndi.service.web.config.mybatis.MyBatisJSONHandler},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
conf = #{conf,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
conditions = #{conditions,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update reader_hive set data_source = #{dataSource,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.netease.bdms.ndi.service.web.config.mybatis.MyBatisJSONHandler}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, conf = #{conf,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, conditions = #{conditions,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
